label: Alias Groups: six hard-coded strings (aliases.ts:27-32, explicit.ts:116-119) plus Python shim (skill_advisor.py:250,1576) must be updated in paired Phase 002 step
Phrase-boost matrix has both positive (1.5-1.6) and negative (-0.4 to -0.6) entries for old name; negative penalties become inert post-rename and impair benchmark disambiguation
Four runtime mirror trees (.opencode, .claude, .codex, .gemini) all have deep-agent-improvement named agent; must be renamed together as one step
CLI command files body text and .codex/config.toml registration name the old skill; must update alongside mirror rename
deep-model-benchmark alias group may also need rename decision; must be explicitly decided in Phase 002 decision-record
description.json auto-regeneration requires explicit generate-context.js invocation post-git-mv; not automatic
sk-prompt-small-model SKILL.md cross-references deep-agent-improvement; must update during Phase 002
HARD GATE: Lane C trace-normalization root changes with skill dir rename; building Lane C against old name then renaming requires full harness path rebuild. Option A (rename first) is strictly safer
Phase 002 freeze inventory step prevents dangling refs; generated/cache files (score caches, vitest results, benchmark outputs) need explicit four-column classification
TypeScript scorer and Python shim must be updated together; split-brain failure if only one is updated and runtime falls back to Python path
